IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: Streets Are For Everyone SAFE aims to improve the quality of life for pedestrians bicyclists and drivers alike by reducing traffic fatalities to zero. SAFE addresses the problem in a holistic fashion through direct education broad awareness campaigns partnerships community outreach policy and legislation support for those impacted and other proven strategies.
IRS990.MissionDesc: Streets Are For Everyone SAFE aims to improve the quality of life for pedestrians bicyclists and drivers alike by reducing traffic fatalities to zero SAFE addresses the problem in a holistic fashion through direct education broad awareness campaigns partnerships community outreach policy and legislation support for those impacted and other proven strategies
IRS990.Desc: Finish The Ride and Finish The Run athletic events encourage a healthy and active lifestyle through cycling and running The theme of the events is Never Give Up They also help to raise awareness of the need for safer roads for all road users These events had over 1500 participants and their message reached over 2 million through promo distribution social media and news media o

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: Streets Art SAFE is a film competition where high school students are mentored by industry professionals on how to make impactful traffic safety PSAs Winners are awarded trophies at a red carpet awards ceremony The three best PSAs are awarded grants of funds for the school arts departments In 2022 there were a total of 238 students across 21 schools who took part in the Street Art SAFE film competition

ProgSrvcAccomActy3Grp.Desc: SAFE Support provides a free wrap-around support service to help those impacted by traffic violence get back on their feet In 2022 there were twenty-seven individuals helped with SAFE Support

Form990PartVIISectionAGrp.TitleTxt: Dir of Public Affairs and Board Secretary

ProgramServiceRevenueGrp.Desc: Regulation and Administration of Transportation Programs
Regulation and Administration of Transportation Programs

OtherExpensesGrp.Desc: Event Giveaways -- medals, shirts, trophies, food

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: | PartandLinenumber:,Explanation:| Part2SectionBLine1a,Encouraged volunteers to contact legislators in support of legislation that would help make roads safer.| Part2SectionBLine1b,Video conferences with legislators their staff or government officials or speaking in front of state committees on behalf of legislation that would make roads safer. Meeting with other advocates or writing publications about legislation that would make roads safer.| Part2SectionBLine1e,Writing online blog posts or social media posts giving information about legislation that would make roads safer.| Part2SectionBLine1g,Video conferences with legislators their staff or gov't officials or speaking in front of state committees on behalf of legislation that would make roads safer.| Part2SectionBLine1i,Working with media outlets to provide information for media stories.|
Streets Art SAFE -- a film competition where high school students are mentored by industry professionals on how to make impactful traffic safety PSAs.
Damian Kevitt is the Executive Director and President of the Board of Directors. He is also the son of Mark Kevitt who is the Vice-President of the Board of Directors.
There were no committees in 2022 authorized to act on behalf of the governing body.
The Board of Directors has empowered the Executive Director to manage the organization and file legal and tax documents on behalf of the organization without the need for further review.

There is no formal process for review of the 990 before filing. The 990 is reviewed after filing. The Board of Directors has empowered the Executive Director to manage the organization and file legal and tax documents on behalf of the organization without the need for further review.

The Vice-President of the Board of Directors was assigned the function of checking for any conflicts of interest and ensuring they were properly reported. He has inquired into possible conflicts of interest when they arose.
These documents are available electronically upon request. Contact information is provided on our website to request these documents.
Run Course Management -- $17240; Ride Course Management -- $3000; Photography $650; Live Music $550; Event Production Help $1100; Social Media and Outreach $3210

| Description:, Expense Amount:, Grants Amount:, Revenue Amount:| SAFE engages in broad public awareness campaigns using social media news media and events. The purpose is to raise awareness of the need for safer roads and responsible driving habits. In 2022 these campaigns resulted in an estimated 7 to 10 million impressions across Southern California., $4324, $0, $7800| SAFE advocates for the implementation of sensible policy and legislation that would help to improve the safety of pedestrians cyclists and drivers as they use California's roads. It accomplishes this using social media news media and events. SAFE's advocacy resulted in major road safety improvements to Griffith Park and Angelino Heights. We also supported half a dozen pieces of road safety legislation., $6345, $0, $8152|
